Interrupt Source Priority

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x0
Size:
0x4
Array Dimensions:
[128]
Array Stride:
+0x4
Total Size:
0x200
Source:
plic_rf.rdl

Description

Sets the priority level for a global interrupt source. Priority 0 disables the interrupt. Priorities 1-7 are active, with 7 being highest. Source 0 (priority[0] @ 0x0000) is unused and hardwired to 0.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:3] reserved rw 0x0 -
[2:0] priority rw - Priority

Field Descriptions

priority - Priority

Interrupt priority level (0=disabled, 1=lowest, 7=highest)
